rationale: The page contains significant scientific information regarding a newly recognized form of diabetes (Type 5) and an advanced cancer treatment technology (SPArc). It also includes details of educational mentoring programs.
cleanedText:
5.6.9. TYPES OF DIABETES
Malnutrition-related diabetes has been officially recognized and named “type 5 diabetes” at International Diabetes Federation’s (IDF) World Diabetes Congress.
* Also called J-type diabetes, is known to be associated with under nutrition and low weight (body mass index (BMI)).
* Diabetes occurs either when the pancreas does not produce enough insulin or when the body cannot effectively use the insulin it produces.
* It is a type of diabetes linked to chronic undernutrition, especially during childhood or adolescence.
Other Types of Diabetes
* Type 1: Autoimmune destruction of insulin-producing beta cells that prevents your pancreas from making insulin.
* Type 2: Mainly caused by obesity and over nutrition (Body does not use insulin well).
* Gestational: Occurs with high blood glucose during pregnancy and can cause complications for both mother and child.
5.6.10. STEP-AND-SHOOT SPOT-SCANNING PROTON ARC THERAPY (SPARC)
For the first time, SPArc has been used to treat an Adenoid Cystic Carcinoma (ACC), a relatively rare form of cancer.
About Step-and-Shoot Proton Arc (SPArc)
* A kind of advanced radiation therapy technique (kills cancer cells or slows their growth by damaging their DNA).
* It works by targeting tumours with protons while sparing surrounding tissue.
* Benefits: Improves the quality of radiation dose planning for various cancers like head and neck, brain, etc.
Lakshya Mentoring Programs 2026
* Lakshya Mains Mentoring Program 2026: 4 Months Expert Intervention. A Strategic Revision, Practice, and Mentoring Program for UPSC Prelims Examination. Starting 14 January 2026.
* Lakshya Prelims & Mains Integrated Mentoring Program 2026: 7.5 Months duration. Starting 15 January 2026. VisionIAS offers unified guidance for UPSC aspirants across both stages.
* Highlights of the Program:
* Coverage of the entire UPSC Prelims and Mains Syllabus.
* Development of Advanced answer writing skills.
* Highly experienced and qualified team of senior mentors for continuous support and guidance.
* Special emphasis to Essay & Ethics.
* A structured plan of revision for GS Prelims, CSAT, and Current Affairs.
* Effective Utilization of learning resources, including PYQs, Quick Revision Modules (QRMs), and PT-365.
